plan: We'll trim SPY to reduce concentration and meet the single-name mandate.
All leveraged ETFs, SOXL and SPAL, will be sold to zero to preserve capital.
QQQI will be increased to enhance income and broad market exposure.
QQQ and SMH will be trimmed to reduce overall broad index and weak sector exposure.
This plan aims for capital preservation by reducing risk and leverage significantly.
A substantial cash buffer will be maintained for stability and future opportunities.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets approximately 1.5% monthly growth, prioritizing capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration, aiming for lower drawdown. However, it will likely underperform in strong bull markets.

plan: SPY will be trimmed to meet the single-name concentration mandate.
All leveraged ETFs, SOXL and SPAL, will be sold to reduce overall leverage.
QQQI, QQQ, and SMH will be trimmed to reduce exposure to weaker performers.
ZS will be bought as a new position, leveraging its strong scanner setup.
This plan balances growth with risk management, maintaining a moderate cash buffer.
The goal is to reduce overall portfolio leverage and concentration.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets approximately 2.5% monthly growth, focusing on risk-first growth. It reduces leverage and concentration while adding quality setups. Expect moderate drawdowns, but it may not capture extreme upside.

plan: SPY will be trimmed to meet the single-name concentration mandate.
SOXL and SPAL will be sold to exit positions below their stops.
QQQI, QQQ, and SMH will be trimmed to reallocate from weaker performers.
ZS and NVDA will be bought, leaning into high-scoring growth setups.
This aggressive plan focuses on stretching growth with concentrated bets.
Leverage will be managed within limits, with strict stop discipline.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets approximately 4% monthly growth, aiming for stretched growth. It involves higher concentration and leverage, leading to potentially larger drawdowns. Be aware that leveraged ETFs decay daily, magnifying both gains and losses.

plan: SPY will be trimmed to reduce concentration and rebalance the portfolio.
All leveraged ETFs, SOXL and SPAL, will be sold to eliminate high-beta exposure.
QQQI will be significantly increased to prioritize steady monthly distributions.
QQQ, CRWD, and SMH will be trimmed to reduce growth and high-beta exposure.
This plan focuses on generating reliable income with a low drawdown profile.
A cash buffer will be maintained for stability and to smooth out distributions.
income.read: This income plan targets approximately 1% monthly yield, prioritizing steady distributions. It significantly reduces leverage and high-beta names for lower drawdown. While aiming for reliable income, distributions are variable, and NAV can still fall in selloffs.
